message:
feat(explain): rewrite EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN for SELECT to emit multi-row compiled plans

connection.rs:
- execute_explain_query_plan for SELECT now uses a three-tier
  strategy: (1) check for planner_select_directive and return its
  explained detail, (2) compile the SELECT to VDBE via
  compile_table_select and call explain::explain_query_plan to
  produce multi-row id/parent/notused/detail hierarchy from the
  compiled program, (3) fall back to legacy single-row "SCAN table"
  output
- This enables richer query plan output with proper parent/child
  relationships matching SQLite's EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN semantics
- Add index_ordered_scan_reliable field to CodegenContext
- Insert/Update/Delete arms refactored to use to_row helper but
  remain functionally identical (single-row output)

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- bd-wwqen.1 (COUNT hot-path): document count_all_rows test audit
  and SQLite isSimpleCount/OP_Count archaeology
- bd-wwqen.2 (IN/EXISTS): diagnose EXISTS 20x slowness from eager
  Expr::Literal materialization, document SQLite's 4-tier IN
  strategy, analyze legacy compile-once/call-per-row EXISTS pattern
- bd-wwqen.5 (compiled JOIN): document VDBE JOIN routing flip to
  all backends including :memory:, confirm green status (626/27)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
